items.name: OpenMontage
items.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

descriptions.zh: 世界上第一个开源的代理视频制作系统。 12条管道、52种工具、500+座席技能。将您的人工智能编码助手变成一个完整的视频制作工作室。
descriptions.en: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.

descriptions.zh: 专为 AI 打造的 macOS 视频编辑器
descriptions.en: macOS video editor built for AI

items.name: voicebox
items.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

descriptions.zh: 开源人工智能语音工作室。克隆、指令、创造。
descriptions.en: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

items.name: Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
items.description: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0

descriptions.zh: AI 代理的 817 项结构化网络安全技能 · 映射到 6 个框架：MITRE ATT&CK、NIST CSF 2.0、MITRE ATLAS、D3FEND、NIST AI RMF 和 MITRE F3（打击欺诈） · Agentskills.io 标准 · 可与 Claude Code、GitHub Copilot、Codex CLI、Cursor、Gemini CLI 和 20 多个平台配合使用 · 29 个安全域 · Apache 2.0
descriptions.en: 817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0

descriptions.zh: Penpot：用于设计和代码协作的开源设计工具
descriptions.en: Penpot: The open-source design tool for design and code collaboration

items.name: Stirling-PDF

descriptions.zh: GitHub 上排名第一的 PDF 应用程序，可让您在任何地方的任何设备上编辑 PDF
descriptions.en: #1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere
